anand.name: Anand Awasthi
anand.comment: Powerton Engineering ta sanya aikin amfani da makamashin rana ya zama mai sauƙi da kuma sauƙi. Ƙungiyarsu ta ɗauki kula da komai daga farko zuwa ƙarshe, kuma muna jin daɗi sosai da sakamakon.

sanjay.name: Sanjay Patil
sanjay.comment: Na yi farin ciki da zaɓar Powerton Engineering don shigarwar mu, kuma ba zan dadin yin wa kowane ɗan uwana shawara ba.

rhea.name: Rhea Sharma
rhea.comment: Samfuran inganci na musamman da sabis na abokan ciniki na musamman. Ƙwarewar fasaha ta ƙungiyar tana da ban sha'awa kuma tana da ƙwarewa sosai.

priya.name: Priya Mehta
priya.comment: Yin aiki tare da Powerton Engineering ya kasance gogewa mai ban mamaki. Hanyoyin sarrafa su ta atomatik sun canza tsarin samarwa mu kuma sun inganta inganci da kashi 35%. An ba da shawarar sosai don ayyukan sarrafa masana'antu ta atomatik.

kavya.name: Kavya Singh
kavya.comment: Sabis na musamman da tallafin fasaha! Ƙungiyar ta ba da jagora na musamman yayin aiwatar da aikinmu na rana. Hanyarsu ta sana'a da isar da lokaci sun wuce tsammaninmu gaba ɗaya.

rajesh.name: Rajesh Kumar
rajesh.comment: Powerton Engineering ta kai daidai abin da suka yi alkawari. Tsarin kayan aikin auna da suka shigar ya kasance yana aiki da kyau sama da shekaru biyu. Tallafin su bayan sayar da kyan gani ne kuma ko da yaushe suna amsa.

productSections.needSolarInverterSolutions: Kuna buƙatar Hanyoyin Inverter na Rana?
productSections.surgeProtectionDescription: Masana mu na kariya za su iya tsara cikakkun tsarin kariya na rarrafe don shigarwa.
productSections.solarInverterDescription: Injiniyoyin mu na makamashin rana za su iya tsara mafi kyawun tsarin inverter don shigarwar ku ta rana.
productSections.solarChargeDescription: Masana mu na makamashin rana za su iya taimaka muku zaɓar daidaitaccen mai sarrafa caji don tsarin baturin ku.
productSections.energyStorageDescription: Masana mu na adana makamashi za su iya tsara mafi kyawun tsarin baturi don shigarwar ku ta rana.

chatbot.welcome: Barka da zuwa Powerton Engineering! Yaya zan iya taimaka muku yau?

responses.products: Muna ba da cikakkun samfuran sarrafa masana'antu, kayan lantarki, na'urori, tsarin hasken rana da sauransu. Wanne irin samfurori ne kuke nema?
responses.services: Hidimominmu sun haɗa da shigarwa, kulawa, daidaitawa, tallafin fasaha da mafita na musamman. Wanne hidimar ne kuka fi so?
responses.contact: Kuna iya kiran mu a +91-9911315121 ko aika mana imel a info@powertonengineering.com. Ofishinmu yana Delhi, India.
responses.quote: Zan yi farin ciki in taimaka muku sami farashin! Don Allah ku ziyarci shafin farashinmu ko ku ba ni bukatunku.
responses.support: Ƙungiyar tallafin fasaharmu tana nan don taimaka! Don Allah bayyana tambayar fasaha ko matsalar ku.

powerton.name: Powerton Engineering Pvt. Ltd.
powerton.description: Leading industrial automation and electrical engineering company serving clients globally. Specializing in power plant automation, solar installations, and manufacturing control systems.

thermal-plant.title: Thermal Power Plant Automation
thermal-plant.description: Complete automation solution for 250MW thermal power plant including control panels, SCADA systems, and safety interlocks.

pharma-plant.title: Pharmaceutical Plant Control System
pharma-plant.description: Advanced process control and monitoring system for pharmaceutical manufacturing with FDA compliance and data integrity features.

solar-plant.title: 10MW Solar Power Installation
solar-plant.description: Complete design and installation of grid-connected solar power plant with monitoring systems and grid synchronization equipment.

water-treatment.title: Municipal Water Treatment Automation
water-treatment.description: Automated control system for water treatment plant serving 500,000 residents with real-time monitoring and quality control.

industrial-automation-demo.title: Demo: Industrial Automation System
industrial-automation-demo.description: Demonstration of complete manufacturing automation capabilities including PLC integration, SCADA systems, and real-time monitoring solutions.

power-distribution-demo.title: Example: Power Distribution Control
power-distribution-demo.description: Example power distribution system showcasing automated load balancing and remote monitoring capabilities for power generation facilities.
